title: pistacia chinensis subsp. falcata
intro: Pistacia chinensis subsp. falcata, also known as Chinese pistache, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese pistache include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. Chinese pistache is typically prepared as a tea or herbal infusion, and it can also be made into a resin or extract for use in supplements and topical applications.
